facebook.caption: Tourists walk straight past this place on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Their loss. Golden Foot Massage Phú Quốc is sitting at 4.9 stars across 455 reviews and somehow still has walk-in slots most afternoons. Feet wrecked from the beach? Body tight from travel days? This is the fix. Local crowd, no resort markup, no upsell pressure. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Flip-flops off. Feet up. Golden Foot Massage Phú Quốc is 4.9 stars for a reason, and the tourists on the main strip have zero idea it exists. Go before they figure it out.
